Network Features
Vonage Network Features simplify access to multiple mobile networks, ensuring a seamless customer experience with optimal application portability.
Leverage mobile networks to unlock a host of new functionality
Powerful fraud prevention and detection capabilities
Streamlined registration experience
Built using CAMARA standards
Leverage mobile networks to unlock a host of new functionality
Powerful fraud prevention and detection capabilities
Streamlined registration experience
Built using CAMARA standards
What are Vonage Network Features?
Vonage Network Features expose new functionalities of communications service providers' (CSPs) networks beyond SMS and Voice, leveraging mobile networks, including 5G, to put new network capabilities into the hands of developers.
Network Features
Vonage Identity Insights API
The Identity Insights API provides real-time access to a broad range of attributes related to the carrier, subscriber, or device associated with a phone number.

Vonage APIs provide powerful tools to integrate privacy and security protections that prevent fraud and validate users. 
Prevent fraud with two-factor authentication

JWT authentication available

Verify API: Getting Started with Silent Authentication
Silent Authentication is a new method of using authentication for your users that relies on a cellular data connection from the users’ device to transmit authentication information.
Privacy and Security
Vonage Fraud Defender Overview
Fraud Defender allows you to set rules to catch fraudulent traffic from phone numbers all from your Vonage API Dashboard.

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive communications platform offering APIs for voice, video, messaging, and network capabilities to integrate real-time connectivity into applications.
llm_raw.notes: While Vonage has an extensive REST API surface for voice and messaging, there is no widely recognized official MCP server; however, it is highly suitable for custom tool building for agents.
